title: Bactris gleasonii
taxonomy: Bactris gleasonii is classified as a species of palm tree within the genus Bactris, and is a member of the family Arecaceae. The genus Bactris is part of the order Arecales, which includes other palm species. Bactris gleasonii is native to South America, specifically in the tropical regions of countries such as Peru and Ecuador. This species is often found growing in humid and subtropical environments. It is a type of palm tree that is adapted to grow in shaded areas, often near rivers or streams.
